system_overview.title: AI-Powered Supply Chain (2024)
system_overview.description: Modern distributed architecture with AI/ML components for demand forecasting and automated inventory optimization.

sections.architecture_diagram: Architecture diagram for AI-Powered Supply Chain (2024)
sections.data_flow: GraphQL federation for API composition. Event-driven communication between services. ML models integrated via prediction APIs.
sections.scalability_considerations: Kubernetes HPA, multi-region deployment, AI model serving at scale.
sections.security_measures: Zero-trust architecture, service mesh (Istio), encrypted communications.
sections.deployment_strategy: GitOps with ArgoCD, canary deployments, automated rollbacks.
sections.monitoring_logging: Observability platform with metrics, logs, traces, and AI-powered anomaly detection.
sections.risks_concerns: AI model accuracy and bias, increased complexity, higher operational costs.
